meta.source: LuckyJ cached NAGA reports plus optional local Mortal/libriichi replay sample

behind_risk_buy.label: Behind-score choices that buy route/value with extra danger

break_pair_anchor.label: Break a pair earlier than NAGA

clean_open_yaku_condition_honor.label: Clean a singleton yakuhai before an unproven open hand can use it

cut_inside_keep_outside.label: Cut a middle tile while keeping outside/safety/yaku material

cut_outside_keep_inside.label: Cut outside material while keeping middle-tile shape

early_guest_honor_cleanup.label: Cut a loose non-self honor before shape cleanup in the first row

honor_cleanup_vs_shape.label: Cut a loose honor while NAGA prefers shape cleanup

keep_defensive_exit.label: Keep genbutsu/suji tiles while cutting elsewhere

keep_dora_or_red.label: Keep dora/red-five material through the clean NAGA cut

keep_pair_anchor.label: Keep a pair or triplet anchor that NAGA wants to break

keep_self_yakuhai_pair_anchor.label: Keep own yakuhai pair or triplet anchor while NAGA breaks it

late_named_exit_over_shape.label: Late keep of a named tile over NAGA's shape-cleaning discard

multi_threat_safe_tenpai.label: Middle/late choices preserving tiles with multiple threats

riskier_than_naga.label: Choose a higher immediate-danger discard than NAGA

safer_than_naga.label: Choose a lower immediate-danger discard than NAGA

spend_defensive_exit.label: Spend a safe-looking tile while NAGA keeps it

spend_off_target_safety_for_shape.label: Spend a safe-looking tile after its target changes

threat_keep_exit.label: Keep a defensive tile against an active riichi/open threat
